title: NovoJuris Legal advises India Quotient on investment in Helium Smart Air
description: Helium Smart Air Private Limited has secured a $2 million investment from India Quotient Alpha V.NovoJuris Legal advised India Quotient Alpha V on their investment in Helium.The transaction team consisted of Gopi Krishna (Senior Associate), Associates Joseph Mario Ritvik and Nitin Thomas. Managing Partner Sharda Balaji provided strategic inputs on this transaction.Helium Smart Air engaged in the business of building innovation-led air conditioners for Indian homes, with a focus on modern design,
